title: Newly released: Restore deleted Process items
excerpt: Published on 07 Jul 2026 We know that sometimes things get deleted by mistake. That’s why we’re excited to announce an important update that gives Process admins more control and peace of mind over their process data - Item restoration, the 30-day safety net.
html:
Published on 07 Jul 2026

We know that sometimes things get deleted by mistake. That’s why we’re excited to announce an important update that gives Process admins more control and peace of mind over their process data - Item restoration, the 30-day safety net.

  • 30-day restoration window: As a Process Admin, you can restore deleted process items within 30 days of deletion. After this 30-day period, they will be permanently deleted.
     

  • Easy recovery: To restore a deleted item, simply click the Deleted items tab within the Administration page, select the items you need, and click Restore.

This new feature ensures that a simple misclick won't lead to permanent data loss, giving you a full month to recover necessary items.

Visit our help documentation to learn more about restoring deleted process items.

Plans: All plans in Work Platform

title: Introducing Ask: Kissflow's AI Agent for workflow insights
excerpt: Published on 3 Jul 2026 A new addition to your homepage - Meet Ask, Kissflow's AI Agent that helps you analyze workflows, generate reports, and uncover insights using natural language. Whether you're looking for key metrics, trends, or visual reports, our agen
html:
Published on 3 Jul 2026

A new addition to your homepage - Meet Ask, Kissflow's AI Agent that helps you analyze workflows, generate reports, and uncover insights using natural language. Whether you're looking for key metrics, trends, or visual reports, our agent helps you get the information you need without manually building reports.

Need answers from your workflow data? Simply ask.

Analyze and discover

Ask brings workflow analytics into a conversational experience, making it easier to explore your data and find answers faster. Here's what you can do:

  • Analyze workflow data by asking questions in natural language.
  • Create reports instantly without manually configuring charts or tables.
  • Explore insights by asking follow-up questions while keeping context.
  • Review how answers were generated with visibility into the workflows, fields, and queries used.

Select up to three workflows as context and start asking questions. Analyze your data instantly, then fine-tune AI-generated reports before saving them to Analytics.

Note:
Only workflows where you are a Process Admin, Report Admin, or Data Admin are available for selection.

Built for faster decision-making

Whether you want to understand averages, totals, distributions, or other key business metrics, Ask helps you move from questions to answers in seconds. It enables users to spend less time building reports and more time acting on insights.

Availability and support

Ask is now available for Enterprise customers. For more information, refer to our help documentation, and let us know your feedback in the comments below.

title: Smart attachment fields now support multiple files
excerpt: Published on 26 Jun 2026 We're excited to announce an enhancement to the smart attachment field that makes document-driven workflows more efficient: you can now upload multiple files to a smart attachment field. What's new Previously, smart attachment fields s
html:
Published on 26 Jun 2026

We're excited to announce an enhancement to the smart attachment field that makes document-driven workflows more efficient: you can now upload multiple files to a smart attachment field.

What's new

Previously, smart attachment fields supported processing only one file. With this update, you can upload multiple files to a single smart attachment field and extract information from all of them.

How it works

  • Upload files one at a time to the smart attachment field.

  • Each newly uploaded file automatically triggers AI-powered autofill for empty fields and child table records.

  • Suggested values from all uploaded files are retained, allowing you to review and use information extracted across documents.

This enhancement is especially useful when the information required to complete a form is spread across multiple documents, such as invoices, purchase orders, contracts, receipts, or supporting records.

Try out this feature and let us know your feedback.

title: Process watchers: Keep stakeholders in the loop
excerpt: Published on 15 Jun 2026 Need to keep people informed about an item's progress without involving them in the workflow? You can now add them as watchers to process items. Watchers can follow an item's progress, stay informed about its progress, and participate
html:
Published on 15 Jun 2026

Need to keep people informed about an item's progress without involving them in the workflow?

You can now add them as watchers to process items. Watchers can follow an item's progress, stay informed about its progress, and participate in conversations without being involved in the workflow itself.

Example

An employee wants their manager to stay informed about a purchase request without involving them in the workflow. By adding the manager as a watcher, they can track progress, receive outcome notifications, and participate in comments.

What can process watchers do?

  • View item details in read-only mode
  • Track item progress through the workflow
  • Participate in item comments
  • Receive key item notifications

Key controls and safeguards

  • Only users who already belong to the process can be added as watchers.
  • Watchers cannot perform workflow actions such as approve, reject, or reassign.
  • Process admins can enable or disable watchers for individual processes.

With process watchers, you can keep the right people informed while ensuring workflows remain focused on the users who get work done. Learn more in our help documentation.

Feature availability

This feature is available in standalone processes and processes inside apps.

Plans: Work Platform

Try out this feature and let us know your feedback.

title: Introducing Kissflow Connector builder: Custom connectors, built by you.
excerpt: Published on 04 Jun 2026 We are thrilled to announce the launch of the Kissflow Connector builder, a powerful new capability that puts the full potential of integration directly into your hands. Now, you can build, manage, and deploy your own custom connectors
html:
Published on 04 Jun 2026

We are thrilled to announce the launch of the Kissflow Connector builder, a powerful new capability that puts the full potential of integration directly into your hands. Now, you can build, manage, and deploy your own custom connectors to integrate Kissflow with virtually any application that has an API.

This isn't just a new feature; it's a new frontier for your workflows.

What is a connector builder?

The Connector Builder is a comprehensive toolkit for developers and IT professionals to create robust, secure, and tailor-made connectors from scratch. You can define your own triggers and actions, manage complex authentication, and configure API calls to meet your exact business needs.

Key features

We've packed the Connector builder with everything you need to create seamless and powerful integrations:

  • Flexible authentication: Natively handle a variety of authentication protocols, with a step-by-step guide for configuring complex flows like OAuth 2.0, ensuring your connections are always secure. You can also manage environment variables for easier testing and deployment.

  • Custom triggers and actions: Design your own triggers that start a Kissflow workflow based on an event in an external app, and create actions that push data and complete tasks in other systems

  • Intuitive input designer: Easily configure the input and output fields for your triggers and actions, giving you full control over the data that flows between your applications.

  • Full connector lifecycle management: This is more than just a builder. You can also:

    • Clone connectors: Quickly replicate and modify existing connectors for new use cases.

    • Manage versions: Keep track of changes with detailed version notes.

    • Streamline approvals: Implement an approval process to review and publish new connectors securely within your organization.

  • Advanced configuration: Handle sophisticated integration scenarios with ease, including:

    • Trigger handshake: Configure webhook verification to ensure your triggers are reliable.

    • Attachment handling: Seamlessly pass files and attachments between applications.

    • Subscription renewals: Manage API subscription logic directly within the connector.

Who is this for?

The Connector builder is designed for anyone who wants to push the boundaries of automation:

  • Developers: Build and deploy custom integrations for your teams with a powerful, streamlined toolkit.

  • IT administrators: Centrally manage and approve all third-party integrations, ensuring security and governance.

  • Citizen developers: You now have the power to create the specific connections you've always needed.

Availability and support

This feature is now live for all users on the Enterprise plan. Try it out today and share your experience with us. For more information and step-by-step instructions, visit our help documentation.

If you have any questions, feel free to comment below or reach out to our customer support team.

title: Protect your data with the new cryptography connector
excerpt: Published on 04 Jun 2026 We are thrilled to announce the launch of the Cryptography connector, an in-built security tool now available in Kissflow integrations. While standard connections like HTTPS protect your data while it travels, this connector allows you
html:
Published on 04 Jun 2026

We are thrilled to announce the launch of the Cryptography connector, an in-built security tool now available in Kissflow integrations. While standard connections like HTTPS protect your data while it travels, this connector allows you to protect the data itself.

The cryptography connector acts as a robust privacy filter for your data pipelines. It functions as a middle step in your integration flow, allowing you to scramble sensitive information or verify data integrity before it reaches its destination. Whether you are storing data in a public spreadsheet or sending it to a third-party partner, your information remains unreadable without the proper digital keys.

Key highlights

  • Symmetric and asymmetric encryption: Easily mask PII and secure sensitive records using shared secret keys or public/private key pairs.

  • PGP signing and verification: Create digital seals for your files to prove the sender's identity and ensure documents haven't been altered.

  • Hash/HMAC capabilities: Generate unique digital fingerprints for your data to verify integrity or use secret keys to authenticate messages (ideal for webhook validation).

  • Seamless integration: Designed as an easy-to-use step within your existing workflows, giving you granular control over encryption and decryption.

What this means for you 

This release empowers you to take full control of your data security without leaving the Kissflow ecosystem. You can now handle compliance-sensitive data with confidence, ensure that external B2B transfers are tamper-proof, and validate the source of incoming webhooks with ease.

Availability and support

Cryptography connector is now live and available to users on all Kissflow plans.

Stop worrying about potential data exposure, and start securing your data end to end today. For detailed configuration steps, visit our help documentation. If you have additional questions, feel free to comment below or contact our customer support team.

title: Introducing lookup columns in tables
excerpt: Published on 02 Jun 2026 Lookup fields are a great way to bring flow data into your forms. When working with multiple lookup values in a table, having those details visible at a glance can make reviewing and comparing data even more convenient. That’s why we’v
html:
Published on 02 Jun 2026

Lookup fields are a great way to bring flow data into your forms. When working with multiple lookup values in a table, having those details visible at a glance can make reviewing and comparing data even more convenient.

That’s why we’ve made lookup fields in form tables easier to read and work with. You can now expand lookup values into separate columns directly within your table, making related data easier to scan without creating additional fields.

Simply enable Reveal fields as columns in the lookup configuration to display selected lookup fields as individual columns while keeping the original lookup field intact.

Plans: All plans

Do try out this feature and let us know your feedback.

title: Smart attachment is now available on mobile
excerpt: Published on 20 May 2026 Smart attachment is now available on mobile, bringing form autofill capabilities to users on the go. A quick recollection Previously available on web, smart attachments allow users to upload documents and is capable of automatically ex
html:
Published on 20 May 2026

Smart attachment is now available on mobile, bringing form autofill capabilities to users on the go.

A quick recollection

Previously available on web, smart attachments allow users to upload documents and is capable of automatically extracting and populating form fields. Now, the same experience has come to mobile users, making form submissions faster and intuitive than ever. This is how it works:

  • Data extraction: Upload documents like ID cards or PDFs to allow extraction of key information.

  • Form autofill: Extracted data is intelligently mapped to relevant form fields. 

  • Faster submissions: Skip manual entry which is prone to errors and submit forms faster.

Optimized for mobile (PWA)

With smart attachments now available on mobile as PWA (Progressive Web Application), users can complete forms anytime, anywhere using documents as input, without having to switch between apps or manually entering data. 

This enhancement reduces friction, improves accuracy, and speeds up workflows across use cases.

Availability and support

Smart attachment for mobile apps is now live for all users on the enterprise plan. Check it out! For more details, visit our help documentation, or leave a comment below.

title: Export chart reports as PNG and PDF formats
excerpt: Published on 18 May 2026 Whether you're sharing operational metrics, project insights, or analytics data, you no longer need to take screenshots. You can now export chart reports used in processes, boards, apps, and analytics in just a few clicks. Open a chart
html:
Published on 18 May 2026

Whether you're sharing operational metrics, project insights, or analytics data, you no longer need to take screenshots. You can now export chart reports used in processes, boards, apps, and analytics in just a few clicks.

Open a chart report, click Export, choose between PNG or PDF formats, and export the report. The file is automatically downloaded to your local system for easy sharing with teams, stakeholders, and external users.

Try out this feature and let us know your feedback in the comments below.

title: Table enhancements: Search, sort, row height, and more!
excerpt: Following our recent mobile release, we are excited to bring the same powerful table management tools to your web forms. Navigating large tables in your browser just got faster, cleaner, and more customizable. Here is what’s new for the web experience: Instant
html:
Following our recent mobile release, we are excited to bring the same powerful table management tools to your web forms. Navigating large tables in your browser just got faster, cleaner, and more customizable.

Here is what’s new for the web experience:

Instant search

No more manual scanning. You can now use the dedicated search bar within form tables to find exactly what you need.

Global filter: Type any keyword, name, or ID, and the table will instantly filter to show only matching records across all columns.

Column sorting

Keep your data organized exactly how you want it. You can now sort table columns in ascending or descending order.

For complex widgets, the system automatically sorts based on primary underlying values to ensure your data stays logical.

New row height settings

Personalize how you view your data. You can now choose between four distinct row height settings to match your workflow:

  • Compact: Data-dense view.

  • Standard: The standard system balance. 

  • Comfortable: Balanced spacing for easier reading.

  • Spacious: Maximum breathing room for complex entries.

Enhanced error reviewing

To help you maintain data integrity, we’ve streamlined how you handle mistakes. You can now review errors directly within web tables more efficiently, making it easier to identify and fix issues before submission.

Internal table scrolling

Handling massive tables? We’ve added internal table scrolling, allowing you to glide through hundreds of rows while keeping the rest of your form in view. This ensures a smoother navigation experience without losing your place on the page.

Availability and support

These enhancements are now live for all users on the web platform.

Note:
Search and sort cover the majority of field types, including Text, Number, Date, User, and Lookup. Please note that file-based or location-based fields (Attachment, Image, Signature, and Geolocation) are excluded from these features.

Check the enhancements in your web forms today! For more details on supported fields, visit our help documentation, or leave a comment below.

title: Now live: Scheduled Analytics reports
excerpt: Published on 24 Apr 2026 We know that data is most powerful when it’s in the right hands at the right time. To help you stay on top of your KPIs without the hassle of manual exports, we are excited to announce Scheduled reports in Kissflow Analytics. What’s ch
html:
Published on 24 Apr 2026

We know that data is most powerful when it’s in the right hands at the right time. To help you stay on top of your KPIs without the hassle of manual exports, we are excited to announce Scheduled reports in Kissflow Analytics.

What’s changed?

You can now automate the delivery of your most critical reports directly to your team’s email inbox. 

 

 

Key features

  • Custom delivery cadence: Admins of analytics reports can schedule to send reports daily, weekly, or monthly at a specific time and timezone that suits their team’s workflow.

  • Flexible formats: Choose how you want to receive your data. Attachments are supported in CSV, XLSX, PDF, and PNG, depending on the report type.

  • Full Admin oversight: Super admins can view and manage every schedule across the organization to ensure consistent reporting.

  • Complete audit trail: Use the Activity log to verify exactly when reports were sent and track delivery success.

Learn more about scheduling reports. Scheduled reports is available for Enterprise plans. Do try out this feature and let us know your feedback in the comments section.

title: Introducing the calendarDays function!
excerpt: Published on 21 Apr 2026 We are excited to introduce calendarDays, a powerful new addition to our formula builder. While dateDiff calculates the standard duration between two dates, calendarDays provides more control and flexibility, designed for use cases lik
html:
Published on 21 Apr 2026

We are excited to introduce calendarDays, a powerful new addition to our formula builder. While dateDiff calculates the standard duration between two dates, calendarDays provides more control and flexibility, designed for use cases like HR leave requests, payroll calculations, and granular time tracking.

Why use calendarDays?

Unlike the dateDiff function that uses exclusive counting, where the start date isn't counted, calendarDays is built for the real world scenarios:

  • Inclusive counting: In calendarDays, Jan 10 to Jan 15 equals 6 days, whereas in dateDiff it will be 5 days (exclusive counting). This ensures that leave requests and work weeks are calculated exactly how your team expects them to be.

  • Smart holiday and weekend awareness: Automatically subtract weekends and holidays based on your account's specific configuration using the day_filter parameter.

  • Advanced units: Support for leftover units like MD (days remaining after full months), YM (months remaining after full years), and YD (days ignoring years).

  • dateTime precision: Switch between simple date counting and high-precision time tracking (hours, minutes, seconds) effortlessly.

The syntax is flexible to meet your needs:

calendarDays(start_date, end_date, “[unit]”, “[day_filter]”)

Where, the accepted parameters are,

unit:

  • D (Default): Returns the total number of days within the range.

  • M: Returns the total number of full months within the range.

  • Y: Returns the total number of full years within the range.

  • HR: Returns the total number of hours between two timestamps.

  • MIN: Returns the total number of minutes between two timestamps.

  • SEC: Returns the total number of seconds between two timestamps.

  • MD: Returns the number of days remaining after full months are subtracted.

  • YM: Returns the number of months remaining after full years are subtracted.

  • YD: Returns the number of days remaining after full years are subtracted.

day_filter:

  • WD (Working days - Default): Skips your account's configured weekends and holidays.

  • AD (All days): Calculates every single calendar day in the range.

  • EW (Exclude weekends): Skips Saturdays and Sundays. Public holidays are treated as working days and included in the count.

  • EH (Exclude holidays): Skips only the holidays configured in your account settings. Saturdays and Sundays are treated as working days and included in the count.

Pro-tips

  • Auto-swap: Don't worry about the order! If your start_date is later than your end_date, the function automatically swaps them to ensure you never get a negative result.

  • date vs. dateTime: Use date fields for inclusive daily counting, perfect for PTO. Use dateTime fields for precise time-based durations, perfect for billable hours.

  • Leap year ready: The function handles leap years (like 2024) automatically, ensuring your February calculations are always accurate.

Availability and support

The calendarDays function is now available to users on all Kissflow plans in your formula editor. Check out the help documentation for more information.

For further questions, comment below, or reach out to our customer support team.

title: Introducing Portal governance and widget insights for apps and portals
excerpt: Published on 21 Apr 2026 We’re excited to roll out portal governance, a powerful new addition to your account governance module, giving you greater visibility over your portals within Kissflow. Building on the foundation of account governance, this feature ena
html:
Published on 21 Apr 2026

We’re excited to roll out portal governance, a powerful new addition to your account governance module, giving you greater visibility over your portals within Kissflow.

Building on the foundation of account governance, this feature enables Super admins and IAM admins to monitor a live portal’s connections, user roles, data access, deployment history, and more, all from a single place.

Go deeper with granular insights across your apps and portals

Alongside portal governance, you now get detailed visibility across apps and portals for the widgets below:

  • Roles 

  • External roles

  • External data objects

  • Flows created (Process, Board, and Dataform)

  • Public forms

 

With portal governance and these enhanced insights, you can confidently manage your portals and apps, ensure data security, and maintain compliance with ease.

Visit our help documentation to dive deeper into portal governance.

Check them out today and experience smarter governance across Kissflow.

title: Launched now: A fresh look for Kissflow!
excerpt: Published on 10 Apr 2026 We're absolutely thrilled to unveil a modernization of Kissflow's interface! We've poured our hearts into refining your workspace to make your experience feel smoother, intuitive, and joyful! Rest assured, all the powerful features and
html:
Published on 10 Apr 2026

We're absolutely thrilled to unveil a modernization of Kissflow's interface!  We've poured our hearts into refining your workspace to make your experience feel smoother, intuitive, and joyful!

 

 

Rest assured, all the powerful features and functionalities you love and rely on are staying right where they are! It’s the same great Kissflow, just dressed up for success!

Plans: All plans in Work Platform.

Do let us know your feedback in the comments.

title: Breaking the barrier: Reference section fields while configuring table conditions
excerpt: Published on 02 Apr 2026 If you’ve ever felt like your Kissflow tables’ conditions were on a deserted island, they no more are. We’re officially removing the barriers between your section and your table fields' logic. Previously, referencing section fields ins
html:
Published on 02 Apr 2026

If you’ve ever felt like your Kissflow tables’ conditions were on a deserted island, they no more are. We’re officially removing the barriers between your section and your table fields' logic.

Previously, referencing section fields inside tables required workarounds and hidden helper columns. With our latest update, context-aware tables are here to streamline your workflows.

What’s changing?

You can now reference section fields (the fields in your main form sections) directly within your table. Key capabilities now live:

  • Dynamic visibility: Hide the Flight number column unless the section field Travel type is set to International.

  • Smart validations: Set custom error rules in a table based on a Total budget field in the section.

  • Conditional requirements: Make Client name mandatory in a table only if the section’s Project category is External.

  • Advanced filtering: Use section field values to filter lookups within the table.

What this means for you

  • Cleaner forms: Eliminate helper columns that only existed to bridge data, resulting in a better UI for your users.

  • Faster building: Save development time by applying logic directly without complex workarounds.

  • Better data integrity: Ensure your table data is always in sync with the overall context of the form.

Availability and support

This update is live for users across all Kissflow plans, in both platform and apps. You can start referencing section fields in your table settings immediately!

Pro tip: Check your existing complex forms. You'll be able to delete those old hidden helper columns and simplify your logic today.

For any questions, comment below, or reach out to our customer support team.

title: New in Kissflow Apps: Process submission lock just got an upgrade
excerpt: Published on 1 Apr 2026 Process submission lock allows administrators lock a process workflow. When the lock is enabled, users are unable to create new items or submit items in draft until the lock is removed. The process remains locked until an administrator
html:
Published on 1 Apr 2026

Process submission lock allows administrators lock a process workflow. When the lock is enabled, users are unable to create new items or submit items in draft until the lock is removed. The process remains locked until an administrator disables it.

What has changed?

Previously in Kissflow Apps, you could lock submissions for a process from its individual settings within the app builder.

With this update, the configuration is now also accessible from the Manage page of an app: Manage > Settings > Process submission lock, where app administrators can lock or unlock any process instantly, without deploying the app again.

The setting remains available for individual processes in the app builder as well, so existing workflows are not affected.

What this means for you

  • Administrators can now lock or unlock a process at any time directly from an app's Manage > Settings, with changes taking effect immediately.

  • Changes made in Manage > Settings are reflected in the process' individual settings within the app builder, and vice versa.

  • The setting is environment-specific. Process submission locks applied in development, staging, or production environments are independent of one another and must be managed separately in each environment.

Check out the help documentation for more information. If you have any queries, please feel free to reach out to us!

title: New in Kissflow Apps: Build custom page components with AI
excerpt: Published on 24 Mar 2026 We are excited to announce that you can now build custom page components using AI in Kissflow Apps. Describe what you'd like to build, and the AI generates a component tailored to your exact requirements — covering layout, features, vi
html:
Published on 24 Mar 2026

We are excited to announce that you can now build custom page components using AI in Kissflow Apps. Describe what you'd like to build, and the AI generates a component tailored to your exact requirements — covering layout, features, visual style, and your app data. It's a fast, flexible addition to the ways you can already design and customise your app pages.

Key highlights

  • AI-assisted building: Describe what you need in plain language and the AI generates a component for you. Refine it further at any time through the chatbot.

  • Built-in Kissflow SDK integration: The AI automatically incorporates Kissflow's SDK methods into the generated component, so your component can interact with the other native components on the page seamlessly.

  • Live preview: See your component take shape in real time as soon as it's generated.

  • Connect your data: Link directly to your existing process, board, or data forms as the data source for each component.

  • Flexible input parameters: Add three types of input parameters to make your components dynamic and reusable.

  • Publish and revert: Publish your component when it's ready, and roll back to any previously published version whenever you need to.

What this means for you

This is a significant upgrade in how page components can be built. Alongside the existing ability to write and upload your own manually coded component, you can now describe what you want in plain language and let the AI generate a fully functional page component for you.

Here's what that unlocks:

  • Accessible to everyone: You have the freedom to build sophisticated, tailored components without writing a single line of code. If you can describe what you want, the AI can build it.

  • Faster turnaround: Components that would have taken hours to code manually can now be generated and refined in minutes.

  • More creative control: You can ask for exactly the layout, interactions, and visual style you have in mind, rather than adapting to what's technically feasible for you to build yourself.

  • Iterative by design: Refining a component is as simple as describing the change. There's no need to dig into code to tweak a colour, adjust a layout, or add a new filter.

Availability

This feature is available for all apps under the Kissflow Work Platform Enterprise plan.

Try out this feature and let us know your thoughts below! Check out the help documentation for more details.

title: New in Kissflow Apps: Introducing the Repeater component
excerpt: Published on 17 Mar 2026 We are thrilled to announce a new component in Kissflow Apps: Repeater. The Repeater is a powerful, configurable data display component that lets you design a layout template once and automatically repeat it for every record in your da
html:
Published on 17 Mar 2026

We are thrilled to announce a new component in Kissflow Apps: Repeater.

The Repeater is a powerful, configurable data display component that lets you design a layout template once and automatically repeat it for every record in your data source.

Connect it to any data source: forms, processes, or boards: and it renders each item using the same template, keeping your UI consistent without manual effort.

Key features

  • Virtualized rendering: Handles large data sources without performance impact.

  • Infinite scroll: Automatically loads more records as users scroll.

  • Drag-and-drop integration: Seamlessly works with the page builder interface.

  • Template-based design: Create once, applies to all data records.

  • Performance optimization: Maintains smooth scrolling regardless of data source size.

  • Multi-source support: Connect to data forms, processes, boards, and variables.

What this means for you

Faster development: Build beautiful, data-driven interfaces quicker. Design your template once and let the Repeater handle the rest automatically.

Consistent user experience: Every data record displays with the same polished design, ensuring your users get a cohesive experience across all content.

Effortless scaling: Whether you have 10 or 10,000 records, the Repeater maintains peak performance through intelligent virtualization and loading strategies.

Enhanced productivity: Focus on your business logic instead of repetitive UI work. The Repeater eliminates the need to manually create layouts for each data item.

Design flexibility: From simple lists to complex grid layouts, the Repeater adapts to your design vision while maintaining optimal performance and user experience.

Availability

This component is available for all apps under the Kissflow Work Platform Enterprise plan.

 

Try out this feature and let us know your thoughts below! Check out the help documentation for more details.

title: Just released: AI control center
excerpt: Published on 12 Mar 2026 AI features across the account help users automate tasks, generate insights, and work more efficiently. As users adopt these capabilities, administrators may need greater control over how AI is used across their account. We’re excited
html:
Published on 12 Mar 2026

AI features across the account help users automate tasks, generate insights, and work more efficiently. As users adopt these capabilities, administrators may need greater control over how AI is used across their account.

We’re excited to introduce the AI control center, a centralized place where administrators can manage AI access across their Kissflow account.

What’s in it?

Super admins can now enable or disable AI services for their account and control access to individual AI features from a single place. This makes it easier for organizations to manage AI adoption while aligning with internal governance and compliance requirements.
 

Note: This feature is available for Enterprise Work Platform customers.

Admins, use this feature to control everything AI in your account, refer to our help documentation and leave us your feedback.

title: New integration action: Add multiple rows to Google Sheets in one go
excerpt: Published on 05 Mar 2026 Managing large amounts of data just got a whole lot faster! We’ve upgraded our Google Sheets connector with a highly requested action: Create rows in bulk. Instead of sending data one row at a time, you can now push multiple rows into
html:
Published on 05 Mar 2026

Managing large amounts of data just got a whole lot faster! We’ve upgraded our Google Sheets connector with a highly requested action: Create rows in bulk.

Instead of sending data one row at a time, you can now push multiple rows into your spreadsheet in a single request. Whether you're syncing weekly reports or migrating task lists, this addition significantly reduces integration runtimes and keeps your workflows snappy.

What this means for you

  • Efficiency: You can add dozens of rows instantly.

  • Simple setup: Just select your source sheet and map your columns to the corresponding fields.

This feature is now available to users on all Kissflow plans. For any questions, comment below, or reach out to our customer support team.

title: Your new favorite shortcut: The attachment summarizer
excerpt: Published on 26 Feb 2026 We know the struggle: You are ready to approve a request, but first, you have to dig through a 30-page vendor quote to find the payment terms. It’s time-consuming and slows down your entire workflow. Our latest update, AI summarizer fo
html:
Published on 26 Feb 2026

We know the struggle: You are ready to approve a request, but first, you have to dig through a 30-page vendor quote to find the payment terms. It’s time-consuming and slows down your entire workflow.

Our latest update, AI summarizer for attachments, removes this friction, speeding up the way you work. This feature supports files uploaded to your Image, Attachment, and Smart attachment fields.

What’s new? 

  • Instant overview: When you preview an attachment, you will see a new Generate summary button. With one click, the AI generates an instant summary based on a standard, pre-fed prompt, providing you with a concise overview of the attachment.

  • Drill down for details: You can edit the prompt to ask for exactly what you need. The AI re-scans the attachment based on your custom prompt and delivers the specific data you requested.

Availability and support

Speed up your approvals today! This feature is available to the Enterprise plan users across the Kissflow platform and Apps: Process, Board, and Dataform.

For more information, visit our help documentation. If you have any questions, comment below or reach out to our customer support team.

title: New in Kissflow Apps: New variable types with updated limits
excerpt: Published on 26 Feb 2026 What's new? We are thrilled to introduce three new variable types for JSON variables across apps: Object Array of objects Array of strings What has changed? In addition, we have implemented new limits for JSON variable data and schema
html:
Published on 26 Feb 2026

What's new?

We are thrilled to introduce three new variable types for JSON variables across apps:

  • Object
  • Array of objects
  • Array of strings

What has changed?

In addition, we have implemented new limits for JSON variable data and schema in to ensure system stability and better performance. Now, the following limits apply to new and existing JSON variables in Kissflow Apps across all environments.

Limits for variable type: Object

  • Root object keys: 100 maximum (top level)

  • Nesting depth: 2 levels

  • Nested object keys in level 1: 20 maximum

  • Nested object keys in level 2: 10 maximum

  • Array items: 10 per array

  • Array item object keys: 10 per array

Example JSON for object

{
  "orderId": "po1001",
  "productName": "Laptop",
  "category": "Electronics",
  "quantity": 5,
  "status": "active",
  "createdAt": "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z",
  "customer": {
    "customerId": "cust001",
    "name": "Alice Johnson",
    "email": "alice@example.com",
    "phone": "555-1234",
    "address": {
      "street": "123 Main St",
      "city": "New York",
      "zip": "10001"
    }
  },
  "payment": {
    "method": "credit_card",
    "amount": 4999.95,
    "currency": "USD",
    "status": "paid"
  },
  "tags": ["priority", "fragile", "express"]
}

Limits for variable type: Array of objects

  • Root array items: 100 maximum

  • Nesting depth: 3 levels

  • Nested object keys in level 1: 30 maximum

  • Nested object keys in level 2: 20 maximum

  • Nested object keys in level 3: 10 maximum

  • Array items: 10 per array

  • Array item object keys: 10 per array

Example JSON for array of objects
[
{
"orderId": "po1001",
"customer": {
"customerId": "cust001",
"name": "Alice Johnson",
"email": "alice@example.com",
"phone": "555-1234",
"address": {
"street": "123 Main St",
"city": "New York",
"state": "NY",
"zip": "10001",
"country": "US"
}
},
"items": [
{
"itemId": "item001",
"productName": "Laptop",
"quantity": 2,
"unitPrice": 999.99,
"discount": 50.00
},
{
"itemId": "item002",
"productName": "Mouse",
"quantity": 3,
"unitPrice": 29.99,
"discount": 0
}
],
"status": "shipped",
"createdAt": "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-01-16T08:00:00Z",
"totalAmount": 2039.95,
"currency": "USD",
"paymentMethod": "credit_card",
"notes": "Handle with care",
"tags": ["priority", "fragile"]
},
{
"orderId": "po1002",
"customer": {
"customerId": "cust002",
"name": "Bob Smith",
"email": "bob@example.com",
"phone": "555-5678",
"address": {
"street": "456 Oak Ave",
"city": "Los Angeles",
"state": "CA",
"zip": "90001",
"country": "US"
}
},
"items": [
{
"itemId": "item003",
"productName": "Monitor",
"quantity": 1,
"unitPrice": 349.99,
"discount": 20.00
},
{
"itemId": "item004",
"productName": "Keyboard",
"quantity": 1,
"unitPrice": 79.99,
"discount": 0
}
],
"status": "pending",
"createdAt": "2026-02-10T14:00:00Z",
"updatedAt": "2026-02-10T14:00:00Z",
"totalAmount": 409.98,
"currency": "USD",
"paymentMethod": "paypal",
"notes": "",
"tags": ["standard"]
}
]

 Limits for variable type: Array of strings

  • Root array items: 30 maximum

Example JSON for array of strings

["electronics", "clothing", "furniture", "sports", "books"]

What this means for you

As previously notified here, the new variable limits will affect your existing JSON variable data.

We recommend auditing and editing your JSON variable data to comply with these limits to avoid disruption in your apps.

Read more about the variable types and the schema here. Please feel free to contact our support team in case of any queries.

title: Now live: AI-assisted code generation for Run script connector
excerpt: Published on 23 Feb 2026 While the Run script connector has always offered unmatched flexibility, we’re ensuring it’s accessible to everyone, regardless of their coding background. Say hello to a world where your creativity is the only limit, not your knowledg
html:
Published on 23 Feb 2026

While the Run script connector has always offered unmatched flexibility, we’re ensuring it’s accessible to everyone, regardless of their coding background.

Say hello to a world where your creativity is the only limit, not your knowledge of JavaScript;  introducing AI-assisted code generation for the Run script connector.

Key highlights

  • Natural language prompting: Describe your logic in plain English and watch AI generate the JavaScript instantly.

  • Intelligent refinement: Ask the RunJS assistant to optimize, or completely rewrite existing code to meet new requirements.

  • Context-aware mapping: The AI assistant automatically creates or references existing input data directly within your code logic.

What this means for you

Whether you're a pro coder or a first-time user, this update changes the way you work. From conquering complex data transformations like date formatting and JSON parsing to automating the repetitive boilerplate, the RunJS assistant handles the technical heavy lifting, letting you focus on high-level logic and architecture.

The possibilities are truly endless. Here are a few use-cases for you to explore:

Use case

What the RunJS assistant can do for you

Data shaping

Reshape JSON payloads, merge or split fields (for example, names/addresses), and convert data types.

Date & time

Handle timezone conversions, calculate SLAs or business days, and compare date ranges.

Lists & arrays

Filter or deduplicate records, split large batches for APIs, and perform advanced lookups.

Availability and support

The RunJS assistant is live and available to users on the Enterprise plan. Open any Integration in your Kissflow platform or Apps and add a Run script action to start using the feature. 

If you have any questions, visit our help documentation, comment below, or reach out to our support team.

title: New: Revamped slider fields in Kissflow forms
excerpt: Published on 24 Feb 2026 Here’s a quick revamp to how users interact with the slider field in your forms. Previously, you had to drag the slider to find that sweet spot value. Now, we’ve added more ways to get the job done: Direct input: Type your exact number
html:
Published on 24 Feb 2026

Here’s a quick revamp to how users interact with the slider field in your forms.

Previously, you had to drag the slider to find that sweet spot value. Now, we’ve added more ways to get the job done:

  • Direct input: Type your exact number into the new input box, and the slider will jump to that position.

  • Precision stepping: Use the up and down arrows in the input box to increase or decrease the value.

  • Classic slide: If you prefer the old way, you can still drag the slider as usual, the input box value will update in real-time to match.

This update, available to users on all Kissflow plans, is about providing a more inclusive, keyboard-friendly experience that boosts your overall efficiency.

For any questions, feel free to comment below.
